# ProviderEventDraft Output

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerdraftmapping -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

Executable SSOT: [`provider-event-draft.riido.json`](provider-event-draft.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `provider-draft-mapping-evidence`.

ProviderEventDraft is the only domain output an adapter may produce.

## Mapped Events

| EventKind | EventType |
| --- | --- |
| `lifecycle` | `StatusUpdate` |
| `session_identified` | `SessionPinned` |
| `text_delta` | `TextDelta` |
| `thinking_delta` | `ReasoningDelta` |
| `tool_call_started` | `ToolCallStarted` |
| `tool_call_completed` | `ToolCallFinished` |
| `tool_call_failed` | `ToolCallFinished` |
| `tool_approval_needed` | `ApprovalRequested` |
| `usage_delta` | `UsageDelta` |
| `log` | `LogLine` |
| `warning` | `LogLine` |
| `error` | `LogLine` |

## Skipped Events

| EventKind | Reason |
| --- | --- |
| `tool_call_delta` | delta payload is not yet canonicalized by providerEventDraft |
| `progress` | progress is local telemetry, not provider raw canonical event mapping |
| `result` | terminal provider result is handled by run controller transition logic |
| `cancellation_requested` | cancellation is orchestration state, not provider Cat C output |
| `timeout` | timeout is session actor transition input |
| `process_exit` | process exit is terminal/run-controller signal |

## Assertions

- `every runtime EventKind is either mapped or intentionally skipped`
- `mapped events match provider_event_draft.go switch returns`
- `skipped events are absent from provider_event_draft.go mapping`
